_header.author: R. A. Carucci
_header.purpose: Clery Act crime categories and definitions per FBI UCR/NIBRS and DOE Handbook for Campus Safety and Security Reporting

metadata.source: Clery Center Understanding Clery Statistics, FBI UCR SRS/NIBRS User Manuals, DOE Handbook 2016

MURDER_NONNEGLIGENT.definition: The willful (nonnegligent) killing of one human being by another.

MANSLAUGHTER_NEGLIGENT.definition: The killing of another person through gross negligence.

RAPE.definition: Penetration, no matter how slight, of vagina or anus with any body part or object, or oral penetration by sex organ, without consent.

FONDLING.definition: Touching private body parts of another for sexual gratification without consent.

INCEST.definition: Nonforcible sexual intercourse between persons who are related to each other within degrees wherein marriage is prohibited by law.

STATUTORY_RAPE.definition: Nonforcible sexual intercourse with a person who is under the statutory age of consent.

ROBBERY.definition: Taking or attempting to take anything of value from a person by force or threat of force.

AGGRAVATED_ASSAULT.definition: Unlawful attack using dangerous weapon or resulting in severe bodily injury.

BURGLARY.definition: Unlawful entry of a structure to commit a felony or theft.

MOTOR_VEHICLE_THEFT.definition: Theft or attempted theft of a motor vehicle.

ARSON.definition: Unlawful and intentional damage of property by fire or incendiary device.

SIMPLE_ASSAULT.definition: Physical attack without weapon or severe injury. Reportable as Clery only when bias-motivated.

LARCENY_THEFT.definition: Unlawful taking of property. Reportable as Clery only when bias-motivated.

INTIMIDATION.definition: Placing another in reasonable fear of harm through threats. Reportable as Clery only when bias-motivated.

DESTRUCTION_VANDALISM.definition: Willful or malicious destruction of property. Reportable as Clery only when bias-motivated.

LIQUOR_LAW.definition: Violations of state/local laws prohibiting manufacture, sale, purchase, transportation, possession, or use of alcoholic beverages.

DRUG_LAW.definition: Violations of state/local laws relating to narcotic drugs, marijuana, synthetic narcotics, or dangerous non-narcotic drugs.

WEAPONS_LAW.definition: Violations of laws prohibiting manufacture, sale, purchase, transportation, possession, or use of firearms or other weapons.

DATING_VIOLENCE.definition: Violence committed by a person who is or has been in a social relationship of a romantic or intimate nature with the victim. Existence determined by length, type, frequency of relationship.

DOMESTIC_VIOLENCE.definition: Felony or misdemeanor crime of violence committed by current/former spouse, cohabitant, person sharing a child, or intimate partner.

STALKING.definition: Engaging in a course of conduct directed at a specific person that would cause a reasonable person to fear for safety or suffer substantial emotional distress.
